AdriaArray - Organization

AdriaArray - MoC

AdriaArray (AdA) officially started on 19 May 2022 with the establishment of the Steering Committee for AdriaArray Seismology Group, coordinated by Prof. Thomas Meier. The Committee approved the Memorandum of Collaboration (MoC) to be signed by the AdA members.

AdriaArray - Member Institutions

AdriaArray - application

The Memorandum of Collaboration (MoC) lists the requirements to become an AdriaArray member. If your institution appears to be eligible to apply for membership, please contact Petr Kolínský or Thomas Meier for further information.

AdriaArray - Contact

See AdriaArray - Working Groups for the contact information related to specific questions. Otherwise, feel free to contact us for any question, comment or feedback.
